refnamediv.refpurpose: Set OpenCV DNN preferable backend and target

listitem.para: Backend string such as "opencv", "cuda", "openvino", "webnn", "timvx", or "cann". Numeric OpenCV enum values are also accepted.
Target string such as "cpu", "opencl", "vulkan", "cuda", "cuda_fp16", "npu", or "cpu_fp16". Numeric OpenCV enum values are also accepted.

refsection.title: Examples
